scene.message: Nanjo: Business? She runs a{nl} business at some ruins?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Tomb robbing~? No way{nl} anyone does that for a living.{waitkey}Sonomura, get a grip~{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: But...{wait_fr:32} that's what{nl} everyone says, isn't it?{waitkey}{ret}
Kaneda: Still here?! If you've{nl} no business, get out already!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Mark, do calm down...{waitkey}{clearbox}Maki will surely be fine.{nl} Come, let's hurry and search.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Mark, calm down...{waitkey}{clearbox}It's all right! Soon enough,{nl} everything will be resolved.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Mark, do calm down...{waitkey}{clearbox}It's all right. Soon enough,{nl} everything should be resolved.{waitkey}{ret}
